name: Con-way Inc.
description: Con-way Inc. was an American multinational transportation and logistics services company headquartered in Ann Arbor, Michigan. It operated through three primary segments: Freight, Logistics, and Truckload. The company provided less-than-truckload (LTL) freight transportation, supply chain management, warehousing, and full truckload brokerage services across North America and internationally. In October 2015, Con-way Inc. was acquired by XPO Logistics, Inc. for approximately $3 billion, integrating its extensive freight and logistics network into XPO's global operations.
